notes: All 9 runs are structurally complete (no truncation/loops/empties) and nail the stable printed fields — registradora name, phone/fax, address, the four finca numbers, DNI, phone, and the full GDPR body. The systematic weakness is consistent across temps: every run misreads BOTH printed header domains (writes www.registros.org and ...registrodelaoliva.org instead of the verified www.registradores.org / ...registrodelapropriedad.org) and every handwritten field (apellidos, applicant email). The Nº Entrada (11656) is corrupted in all 9 (11650, 8650, 8686, 6650, 8856, 8860, 8850) — the leading '1' is dropped or digits swapped in every case. Per the strict rules these visible-text misreads are key_misses, not hallucinations: nothing was invented, and no run fabricated content beyond the form. Lower temps (0.1/0.4) are marginally more faithful than 0.7, where the registry name itself ('Corralesjo') and the titular DNI digits start to corrupt.
